infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: This app needs access to camera to record craft videos and scan QR codes.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: This app needs access to microphone to record traditional knowledge.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: This app needs location access to tag heritage assets with GPS coordinates.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: This app needs access to photo library to save and retrieve heritage content.

plugins.cameraPermission: Allow Dharohar to access your camera to record craft videos and scan QR codes.

plugins.microphonePermission: Allow Dharohar to access your microphone to record traditional knowledge.

plugins.locationForegroundPermission: Allow Dharohar to use your location to tag heritage assets with GPS coordinates.
